The company has invested significantly in reskilling its workforce to adapt to these evolving workplace technologies.

title: Sidney Crosby injury update after Mitch Marner reveals Olympics setback

Marner reported that Crosby was sprained with Grade 2 of an MCL, which means that the Penguins awaited the return of the captain.
